Metadata.title: Jugleey — Mark YouTube videos as watched
Metadata.description: Jugleey marks your YouTube videos as watched with a visible badge. Free Chrome extension so you never re-watch a video.
Metadata.ogDescription: Never watch the same video twice.

Hero.title: Mark <highlight>YouTube videos</highlight> as <mark>watched</mark>, in one click
Hero.subtitle: Jugleey displays a badge on thumbnails of videos you've already watched. Spot them at a glance before you click.

Problem.label: The problem
Problem.title: YouTube doesn't remember what you've watched
Problem.description: You scroll through your recommendations and come across a video. You click, watch 30 seconds... and realize you've already seen it. It's frustrating and a waste of your time.
Problem.stat2Label: lost per month due to already-watched videos
Problem.stat3Label: videos on YouTube with no tracking system

Features.label: Features
Features.title: Everything you need
Features.feature1Description: A single click to mark a video as watched. The icon appears instantly on the thumbnail.
Features.feature2Description: Spot already-watched videos at a glance thanks to the badge displayed directly on YouTube.
Features.feature3Description: Track your watched videos, browse your history, and manage your data — all from the extension popup.
Features.feature4Description: All your data is stored locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server. You're in full control.

HowItWorks.label: No setup needed
HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.step1Description: Add Jugleey to Chrome in one click. No setup required.
HowItWorks.step2Description: Browse YouTube as usual. Jugleey works in the background.
HowItWorks.step3Description: Click the icon to mark a video. The badge appears on the thumbnail.

Pricing.title: Free, forever
Pricing.footnote: Compatible with Chrome and Chromium browsers (Edge, Brave, Opera...).
Pricing.installNote: Jugleey is not yet available on the Chrome Web Store. You can install it manually in a few steps using Chrome's developer mode.
Pricing.installStep1: Click the button below to download the <bold>.zip file</bold>
Pricing.installStep2: Unzip the downloaded file to a folder on your computer
Pricing.installStep3: In Chrome, type chrome://extensions in the address bar and press Enter
Pricing.installStep4: Enable the <bold>Developer mode</bold> toggle in the top right corner of the page
Pricing.installStep5: Click the <bold>Load unpacked</bold> button that appears in the top left
Pricing.installStep6: Select the unzipped folder — the Jugleey icon will appear in your browser toolbar

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.a1: Jugleey is a Chrome extension that integrates directly into YouTube. Once installed, it lets you manually mark videos as watched. A badge then appears on the thumbnails of marked videos, everywhere on YouTube.
FAQ.a2: Yes. Jugleey is 100% free and always will be. No subscription, no hidden fees. Install the extension and use it without limits.
FAQ.a3: Yes. All your data is stored locally in your browser via chrome.storage.local. No data is sent to any external server. You can also export your data as JSON at any time.
FAQ.q4: What happens if I have too many marked videos?
FAQ.a4: Jugleey includes an automatic cleanup system. When storage reaches 9 MB, the oldest videos are automatically removed to free up space.
FAQ.q5: Does the extension work on Firefox or Safari?
FAQ.a5: For now, Jugleey is available only on Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers like Edge, Brave, Opera, etc. A Firefox version may be considered in the future.
FAQ.a6: You can reach us by email for any question or issue. We typically respond within 24 hours.

About.name: Hi, it's Daniel
About.bio2: I build tools that solve real, everyday problems.
About.story: I built Jugleey because I was tired of stumbling on YouTube videos I'd already watched, so I built my own and made it free for everyone.
